name: Create a new Flow in Default Workspace
description: Verifies that a user can open the create flow dialog, fill in the name, and cancel

steps.note: Wait for the page to fully load
Should land on the flows list page
Tab title must contain Zoho Flow

steps.name: Create Flow
steps.note: Create Flow button must be visible

steps.name: Create Flow
steps.note: Click the Create Flow button to open dialog

steps.name: Flow Name
steps.note: Flow name input should appear in dialog

steps.name: Flow Name
steps.note: Input must contain the typed value

steps.name: Cancel
steps.note: Cancel to avoid creating a real flow
Should still be on flows page after cancel
